findings.summary: 12 priority jurisdictions do not have complete source-verified official rosters.
Nevada SOS finance records still have unresolved parsing and candidate-reconciliation gaps.
evidence: 63 live URLs blocked by the current Nevada SOS session
Cached Nevada SoS records remain usable. Refresh the live session with npm run nv-sos:bootstrap before the next live acquisition window.

findings.summary: Some meeting records cannot yet support agenda, vote, and accountability detail because source documents or parsers are missing.
Configured providers with no future-dated meetings require an official-calendar check before the public site treats the calendar as empty.
